questions.question: Which pseudo-class triggers hover effects?
questions.explanation: :hover is triggered when the user points at an element.

questions.question: What property should be used for smooth hover transitions?
questions.explanation: transition creates smooth interpolation between hover states.

questions.question: Which approach is best for a card hover lift effect?
questions.explanation: translateY is GPU-accelerated and doesn't trigger layout.

questions.question: How do you detect devices that support hover?
questions.explanation: @media (hover: hover) detects devices that support hover interactions.

questions.question: What is a common issue with hover effects on mobile?
options: No hover state on touch devices
questions.explanation: Touch devices don't have hover, so effects triggered only on :hover may not work.

questions.question: Which pattern creates an underline that animates from center?
questions.explanation: A ::after pseudo-element with centered position and expanding width creates center underline.

questions.question: What is the ideal duration for hover transitions?
questions.explanation: 200-400ms is the sweet spot for UI hover feedback — fast enough to feel responsive.

questions.question: How do you make hover effects accessible for keyboard users?
questions.explanation: :focus styles ensure keyboard users see interactive feedback.

questions.question: What does filter: grayscale(1) do in a hover effect?
options: Makes image black and white by default, color on hover
questions.explanation: grayscale(1) desaturates; toggling to 0 restores color on hover.

questions.question: Which hover effect combination is most performant?
questions.explanation: transform and box-shadow are composited; width/height/margin/padding trigger layout.

questions.question: What is the 'sticky hover' problem on mobile?
options: :hover state persists after tap until user taps elsewhere
questions.explanation: On mobile, a tap triggers :hover and :active, and the hover state persists until the user taps elsewhere.

questions.question: What is the correct order for link pseudo-classes?
questions.explanation: The correct order is LoVe HAte: Link, Visited, Hover, Active.

questions.question: Which property can create a button glow effect on hover?
questions.explanation: box-shadow with a colored spread creates a glow effect: box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(59,130,246,0.5);

questions.question: How do you create a button press effect with scale?
questions.explanation: Scaling down slightly on :active (0.95) creates a realistic press effect.

questions.question: What is the purpose of will-change for hover effects?
options: Promotes the element to its own compositor layer
questions.explanation: will-change: transform hints to the browser to promote the element to its own layer for smoother animation.

questions.question: Which media query detects touch-only devices?
questions.explanation: pointer: coarse detects touch-based input (fingers on a touchscreen).

questions.question: What does an image zoom hover effect typically use?
options: transform: scale() inside overflow: hidden wrapper
questions.explanation: An overflow: hidden wrapper with transform: scale(1.1) on the image creates a smooth zoom effect.

questions.question: Why should you avoid animating margin for hover effects?
questions.explanation: Animating margin triggers layout, causing other elements to reflow. Prefer transform instead.

questions.question: What does a background fill from left hover effect use?
questions.explanation: A gradient background with background-position transition creates a directional fill effect.

questions.question: How should hover effects be applied for progressive enhancement?
options: Content must be usable without hover effects
Hover effects are required for functionality
questions.explanation: Hover effects are enhancements — all functionality must work without them.
